channel.title: Employer Research on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Employer Research on RaihnForge

item.title: Identify Prospective Employers
item.description:
A note on naming. The original paper named the student’s current employer. For public posting, that entry has been generalized to “the EdTech employer.” Public companies that the student was researching as future career targets remain named, since identifying them is the whole point of a prospective-employer exercise.

TO: Course Instructor FROM: Joshua Keyes DATE: January 14, 2023 SUBJECT: Identify Prospective Employers, A01

Organizational Internship Interest

The following is a list of internships that I would be interested in applying for, with quick reference notes for each.
